item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 021500Z AUTO 14006KT 110V170 9999 -RA ///TCU 15/14 Q1016 TEMPO FEW040CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 021105Z 0212/0312 19010KT 9999 FEW040 BKN070 TEMPO 0212/0217 -SHRA FEW040CB PROB30 TEMPO 0212/0214 23015G25KT 4000 TSRA BKN015 SCT040CB TEMPO 0221/0305 4000 RA BKN015 PROB40 TEMPO 0300/0309 BKN007 TEMPO 0309/0312 SHRA BKN015 FEW020CB
